title: Vaso Heat Wave
lead: A severe heat wave is affecting Vaso with a Z-Score of +4.03. The city is experiencing extremely high temperatures.
body:
The current heat wave in Vaso is at a critical level with a score of 10.0/10. 
 The heat wave is characterized by high temperatures and humidity, with an average humidity of 67% and a wind speed of 13.2 km/h. 
 The Cooling Degree Days (CDD) is at 13.1 GG, indicating a high energy demand for cooling, while the Heating Degree Days (HDD) is at 0.0 GG, indicating no need for heating.
conclusion: Implement immediate measures to mitigate the heat wave's impact.
